steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a textual evidence question. The claim to illustrate is that Alexandra Bergson takes comfort in understanding the world around her. The correct quotation must show her finding comfort specifically through grasping order or structure in nature — not just appreciating nature or facing hardship.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — "She looked fixedly up the bleak street as if she were gathering her strength to face something, as if she were trying with all her might to grasp a situation which, no matter how painful, must be met and dealt with somehow.": shows Alexandra steeling herself to face a difficult situation with determination, not taking comfort through understanding. ✗
  • Choice B — "She had never known before how much the country meant to her. The chirping of the insects down in the long grass had been like the sweetest music. She had felt as if her heart were hiding down there, somewhere, with the quail and the plover and all the little wild things that crooned or buzzed in the sun. Under the long shaggy ridges, she felt the future stirring.": expresses how deeply Alexandra values the land, but not that she finds comfort by understanding the world around her. ✗
  • Choice C — "Alexandra drove off alone. The rattle of her wagon was lost in the howling of the wind, but her lantern, held firmly between her feet, made a moving point of light along the highway, going deeper and deeper into the dark country.": describes a solitary nighttime drive; it conveys no emotion about understanding or comfort. ✗
  • Choice D — "Alexandra drew her shawl closer about her and stood leaning against the frame of the mill, looking at the stars which glittered so keenly through the frosty autumn air. She always loved to watch them, to think of their vastness and distance, and of their ordered march. It fortified her to reflect upon the great operations of nature, and when she thought of the law that lay behind them, she felt a sense of personal security.": directly shows Alexandra feeling fortified and secure by reflecting on the law and order governing the stars — understanding the world around her brings comfort. ✓
That is the correct answer.
